title: Deep Learning
description: In-depth study of deep learning covering neural network architectures, training techniques, and applications. Topics include feedforward networks, convolutional neural networks (CNNs), recurrent neural networks (RNNs), generative adversarial networks (GANs), autoencoders, transfer learning, and attention mechanisms. Students implement deep learning models using PyTorch and apply them to computer vision, natural language processing, and generative modeling tasks. Both CS305 (ML foundations) and MATH220 (linear algebra for tensor operations and backpropagation) are required prerequisites.
topics: Optimization: SGD, Adam, learning rate schedules
outcomes: Design and train deep neural network architectures
Implement CNNs for computer vision tasks
Build sequence models for NLP applications
Apply transfer learning to new domains
Use PyTorch for deep learning research and development
